allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "--- Server health \(direct\) ---"; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:4000/api/health | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output "--- Server health \(via Vite proxy on 5174\) ---"; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:5174/api/health | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output "--- Client index.html ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5174/ -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.bun\\bin;$env:PATH"; Set-Location E:\\Tutorials\\ticket-management-app\\server; bunx prisma init --datasource-provider postgresql 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.bun\\bin;$env:PATH"; Set-Location E:\\Tutorials\\ticket-management-app\\server; bunx prisma migrate dev --name init 2>&1)
